description: 148 - 28-03-2025 - Email from Peter Mendelson to Michael Ellam (Second Permanent Secretary, European Union and International Economic Affairs, CO)

participants.name: Email from Peter Mendelson to Michael Ellam
participants.role: Second Permanent Secretary, European Union and International Economic Affairs

text:
Permanent Secretary, European Union and International Economic Affairs, CO)

From: Peter Mandelson Personal
Sent: Fri 28/03/2025 3:10:10 PM (UTC)
To: Michael Ellam Personal . Morgan McSweeney
Personal , Jonathan Powell Personal ,PM
Private Office Support Team - Internal Personat , "Ailsa Terry
(No.10)" Personal
Ce: Jes Personal , Munao Woodifield
Personal . Ninieri Pandit Personal
Varun Chandra Persona
Subject: Re: Tariff advice as seen from Washington
Thanks
Get Outlook for iOS
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
From: Ailsa Terry Personal
Sent: Friday, March 28, 2025 11:02:17 AM
To: Peter Mandelson Personal Michael Ellam
Personal ; Morgan McSweeney Personal ; Jonathan
Powell Personal PM Private Office Support Team - Internal < Personal
Cc: JCS Personal ; Mungo Woodifield
Personal ; Ninjeri Pandit Personal Varun Chandra
Personal

Subject: RE: Tariff advice as seen from Washington

Peter

Thank you. Confirming receipt and we will highlight this advice to the PM when we pre
brief him shortly. @PM Private Office Support Team - Internal could you print a copy
of this for me to take in?

Ccing Varun and Nin.

Ailsa

438

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

From: Peter Mandelson < Personal =
Sent: 28 March 2025 14:55
To: Ailsa Terry Personal Michael Ellam Personal
Morgan McSweeney Personal Jonathan Powell
Personal
Ce: IES Personal ; Mungo Woodifield
Personal

Subject: Tariff advice as seen from Washington
Importance: High

Ailsa,

The Prime Minister and President agreed to explore an economic partnership -

If we are successful, it will set the basis and terms of our
relationship politically and economically,

Next steps

439


Ultimately, this is a political decision for both sides, taking into account balance of 
interests across domestic constituencies.  
Peter
***
***
440
parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
